`ctf-componentMap.generated` is a React Component within the template-marketing-webapp-nextjs template. As its name indicates, it is a generated artifact rather than hand-authored source, serving as a component map tied to CTF (likely a Contentful or similar content-type-framework integration, based on the naming convention).

Given its role as a component map, it is used to associate content types or identifiers with their corresponding React components, enabling the application to dynamically resolve and render the correct component for a given piece of content. Being marked as generated, it is expected to be produced by a build step or code-generation process rather than maintained manually.
